localized title: Born on the Fourth of July
plot outline: Based on the true story of Ron Kovic (Cruise, in an Oscar-nominated performance), an idealistic young American proudly enlists during the Vietnam War and returns home a paraplegic. Struggling to overcome drug-addiction and depression, he turns his life around and becomes an outspoken critic of the war.
title: Born on the Fourth of July
original title: Born on the Fourth of July
akas: Nascut el 4 de juliol (Spain, Catalan title)
